name: TINY_SCHILLER: A Drop-In German Drama Corpus for Small Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.19992v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: tiny_schiller closes the small-language-model prototyping, fine-tuning, education, and research gap for German literary text, providing a single-fi...
description: arXiv:2607.19992v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: tiny_schiller closes the small-language-model prototyping, fine-tuning, education, and research gap for German literary text, providing a single-file, drop-in counterpart to Karpathy's tiny_shakespeare. The available German literary corpora are larger and richer, but require parser engineering before a single line of training or fine-tuning code...
author: Mark Schutera
